title: Rotten Tomatoes Predicts the 2026 Golden Globes Winners
text: According to Rotten Tomatoes' Golden Globes predictions, Sentimental Value will win Best Motion Picture – Drama at the 2026 Golden Globes. The prediction section provides minimal explanation, simply stating the film title without elaborating on the reasoning behind this choice. This contrasts with several other category predictions in the article, which include detailed justifications for the forecasted winners. Sentimental Value is a Norwegian film featuring two sisters who reconnect with their estranged father, a filmmaker. The film received eight Golden Globe nominations, the highest count among the dramatic competitors.
